Package at.jku.se.iot

package at.jku.se.iot
  • Zugehörige Packages
    Package
    Beschreibung
    at.jku.se
     
  • Klasse
    Beschreibung
    DeviceCommand
    Command dispatched to an IoT protocol adapter to change a device's state.
    DeviceEvent
    Event emitted by an IoT protocol adapter reporting a device-side change.
    IoTException
    Checked exception raised for errors from IoT protocol adapters.
    IoTIntegrationService
    Bridges the SmartHome device layer with physical IoT hardware.
    IoTProtocol
    Abstraction for IoT communication protocols (MQTT, CoAP, Zigbee, etc.).
    IoTProtocolFactory
    Factory that creates the appropriate IoT protocol adapter based on configuration.
    MockProtocolAdapter
    Mock IoT protocol adapter for development and testing.
    MqttProtocolAdapter
    MQTT protocol adapter for communicating with physical IoT devices.
